calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Brett Pedersen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff University of San Francisco.
Raymond E. Rogers, Student Loan Coordinator for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Ali Faritous.
Default was entered against defendant on July 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff University of San Francisco, and against the Defaulted Defendant Ali Faritous as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,584.80.
Prejudgment Interest - $28,888.52.
Attorney's Fees - $3,541.50.
Late Fees - 230.00.
Costs - $230.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $83,881.82.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Off Calendar
